privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated custom domain configuration for Socioboard. It has been verified that the expected domain 'social.agency.local', virtual host file path '/etc/apache2/sites-available/social-agency.conf', document root '/opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/public', and environment file path '/opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/.env' exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt and the grading logic in export_result.sh.
